features: [Apple MFi Certified USB Lightning Cable]: The apple lightning cable is MFi certified to ensure 100% compatibility with iPhone, iPad and iPod(except Apple 15 series). The 3 Metre iphone charger cable is guaranteed not to pop up warning messages, fast charging cable ensuring your devices load and charge safely and quickly at the fastest possible speed. iPhone long charger cable 3M fast charging, you can use freely in your bedroom, office, and even in the backseat of your car.

[Premium Material iPhone Charging Cable]: This iphone 14 charger cable uses a carefully adjusted soft TPE material that resists twisting. iPhone leads for charging designed and built with premium materials, the iphone charger lightning cable protects your devices against overcurrents, overvoltages, short-circuits and overheating. Each long charger cable iphone has been tested with 15000+ times bend lifespan and strong bearing capacity, ensure metal parts don't break and charging is safer.

[Fast Charging and Sync Fast Charger Cable]: Lightning to USB cable with the Apple MFi Chip, the apple lightning cable equips automatic chip recognition function. I Phonefast apple charger cable smart chip ensures fast 5V/2.4A charging and up to 480 Mbps data transfer, sync and charge at the same time at the fastest speeds on your windows PC or Mac. 3M iphone charger cable ensure safe, stable and fast device charging and synchronised data transfer.

[3M Lightning Cable Perfect Compatibility]: Apple USB to lightning cable compatible with iPhone 14/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/14 Plus/ 13/ 13 Pro Max/ 13Pro/ 13mini/ 12/ 12Pro Max/ 12Pro/ 12mini/ 11/ 11 Pro/ 11 Pro Max/ XR/ XS/ XS Max/ SE 2020/ X/ 8/ 8 Plus / 7/ 7 Plus/ 6/ 6s/ 6 Plus/ 6s Plus/ 5/ 5s/ 5C/ SE 2016. iPad charger cable compatible with iPad 5/6/7/8; iPad Air 2/3; iPad mini 2/3/4/5; iPad Pro 12.9 (2015), iPad Pro 12.9 2nd (2017) and the latest iOS system, the USB iphone charger cable perfectly matches most apple products.

[3 Meter Long Phone Charger Cable]: You'll get 1X Apple USB to lightning cable 3M. Our long lightning cable for iphone provide you with a wider range of uses. iPhone charging lead avoids many awkward positions of your arm when charging your phone. Long phone charger cable elongated design allows you to carry it with you and charge it anywhere, such as the car, office, cafe, sofa, bed and so on.

Every USB iPhone charger cable has its service life, in order to make it last longer, please do not touching with in liquid and avoid charging when it was wet. User Tips : 2. The iPhone cable plug inserted into the Lightning devices horizontally avoid the connector damage caused by violent plugging and unplugging. User Tips : 3.
